programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Suzanne doesnt know if boyfriend Alan loves her for her self or her money Mason falls for Alicia but her terrier doesnt like him Isaac falls for Selena who is engaged to someone else

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: Daktari

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: After witnessing a murder Jonathan hits his head and loses his memory As he tries to recover his memory he starts to suspect he may have had a mistress -- and killed her

programme.title: Cagney 408
programme.desc: A weekend spent clearing up lousy precinct paperwork leads Chris and Mary Beth to race to serve a warrant before the statute of limitations expires Meanwhile Det Petrie finds his weekend used up painting his apartment

programme.title: Starsky 312
programme.desc: Starsky 312

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: String and Caitlin travel to a deserted island where a cure is being researched for a biological plague that was developed in Afghanistan Unfortunately the plague has already gotten out of control and the researchers are all dead Complicating matters the Russians have also dispatched a submarine to the island to attempt to recover the cure first When String Caitlin and the subs crew all get exposed to the virus they must work together to find the cure before they all go mad and either kill one another or die

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A woman is driven to murder when her newborns cursed cradle seeks revenge

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team wonders whats up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lous big secret Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold digging RO out on a date but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team wonders whats up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lous big secret Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold digging RO out on a date but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose Matt and Froy struggle with language barriers when an Italian photographer and his assistant resorts to violence because they cant comprehend Will Sonia finally reveal whats happening or will carrying her brothers burden get the best of her

programme.title: 3 10 to Yuma
programme.desc: 3 10 to Yuma

programme.title: TBH 109
programme.desc: TBH 109

programme.title: Munsters 205
programme.desc: Munsters 205

programme.title: Munsters 126
programme.desc: Munsters 126

programme.title: Addams Family 118
programme.desc: Addams Family 118

programme.title: Addams Family 116
programme.desc: Addams Family 116

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Little Luke worships his Grandpa Amos but when he gets in trouble at school for using Grandpas colorful language and telling lies the rest of the family tells Amos to set a better example for Little Luke Amos tries his best to change his ways but after a week he cant stand it anymore and reverts to his old habits When Little Lukes teacher brings him home from school after a serious incident Amos faces a hard choice continue to be his grandsons hero or admit that hes not perfect

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Real McCoys

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Through Rogers trickery Ed believes that he has a shameful heritage so he runs away from home

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Both Carol and Ed want Wilbur to hire a famous decorator to redo the house and stable in a Hawaiian Modern motif

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is asked to stand guard when 50000 is transferred from a specially designed stagecoach strongbox to the North Fork Banks vault Sloan a former bank clerk plans to rob the shipment with a couple of henchman and uses the general store as a base to launch their attack Meanwhile Milly and Mark are held captive in a back room helpless to prevent the heist

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A prison wagon stops at the McCain ranch One of the guards asks Lucas for a bottle of alcohol He refuses Later the guards return and take Lucas prisoner

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Gunsmoke

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Gunsmoke

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Fredy 119
programme.desc: Fredy 119

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A conniving con-man posing as a salesman gets more than he bargained for when he comes knocks at the door of the wrong family

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Wealthy and successful middle-aged businessman Leo Burns suspects that his much younger wife Bridget is having an extramarital affair Leo hires sleazy private investigator GG Devoe to find out the identity of Bridgets lover

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: The Parisian underworld clashes with a greedy developer whose plans are not in line with theirs

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Bogus preacher Brother Charles preys upon the misfortune of attractive young homeless women by leading them toward prostitution under the guise of spreading brotherly love The fake priests scam comes to a sudden halt when mysterious stigmata appear on the hands of his latest flock member Alice Ames as she performs her mission

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A series of deaths from bad prosthetic devices are blamed on product tampering

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: On Halloween night Micki and Ryan are visited by the ghost of their late uncle who has returned from the underworld

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Mchale 225
programme.desc: Mchale 225

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While the castaways prepare for a possible attack from headhunters Gilligan hits his head on a tree and begins seeing things upside down The Professor prepares a cure for him but it only makes him see double instead

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and The Skipper find a government briefcase with top-secret information in the lagoon and when Gilligan handcuffs himself to the briefcase he becomes afraid that the enemy will come to the island and kill him

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The retirement of the postman convinces Luke and Kate that Grandpa Amos should take it easier It backfires when Grandpa instead works too hard and ends up bedridden

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa breaks up Floras romance and is forced to propose to her

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is listed as dead so he can complete a mission

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Inept Max poses as a safe cracker so the Chief orders all federal bank vaults left open

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Pogo Lil is a female truck driver on the run from loan sharks She enters the Third annual Dixie crisscross race So she can win money to pay back the loan shark

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Clint Eastwood moves into the neighborhood Mister Ed sets up a party line with his house which causes nothing but problems for Mr Eastwood

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: A going-on-15-year-old boy-crazy girl has moved into the neighborhood

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: After Klink finds Sergeant Schultz drunk he gets a tough new replacement

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans Heroes

programme.title: Mchale 236
programme.desc: Mchale 236

programme.title: WKRP 219
programme.desc: WKRP 219

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: As mayor Wood must deal with the towns garbage crisis

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood is concerned that now that Taylor is off to college hes not learning to be independent

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: A girl Two Leaf knows comes to town to take care of some business Later shes killed with Two Leafs knife and he has scratches on his face that matches her hands Dan thinks hes being set up but Nelson has no choice but to take him in Later a television reporter is trying to paint Two Leaf as a danger to society Upon hearing this he breaks out of jail

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Two chemists at one of Jonathans subsidiaries have developed a new hallucinogen and their supervisor is killed when he tries to report them to Jonathan

programme.title: Newhart - 814
programme.desc: Newhart - 814

programme.title: Newhart - 612
programme.desc: Newhart - 612

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan wins a million-dollar sweepstakes and is invited to the Howells country club After feeling lonely he issues IOUs to the others so they may also attend He quickly misplaces the winning ticket and they all get evicted

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: After Mitch saves a young girl from drowning he discovers her to be possessed by a demon who then possesses him for the demon needs a sacrifice to solidify its base of power on Earth Aware that time is running out for him Mitch must venture into the netherworld to find help from the only one who can battle the demon the recently deceased Stephanie Holden

programme.title: OPeration Repo
programme.desc: On this special season finale of Operation Repo the team gears up for a mile high repo of a lifetime! Froy and Sonia repo a water blob from a lake house but the RO and his friends refuse to let this deflate their party And with Sonias hands tied she is forced to offer Matt a position on the airplane The team takes to the skies but when plans go awry will Matt make the ultimate sacrifice for the team Or will his ego force everything to spiral violently out of control

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: In the premiere of the final season of Operation Repo the team must recover an airplane and return one-hundred thousand dollars But after two members of the team bail when its time to save the company will the others be able to bounce back in time to avoid a jail sentence

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: Highlander
programme.desc: An immortal Scottish swordsman must confront the last of his immortal opponents a murderously brutal barbarian who lusts for the fabled Prize

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While stopped at the Boars Nest Loretta Lynn is kidnapped by a trio who want her to offer tips about breaking into the music business

programme.title: Hercules 105
programme.desc: Hercules 105

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The resistance releases a virus of Augur on the Taelon headquarters in Washington Things get out of hand

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The team act as watchdogs protecting a secret and unprecedented meeting of international alien experts where they suspect one of them may be an alien

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arrested for a murder he did not commit Wills situation looks desperate when his attorney turns out to be a crooked prosecutor with ambitions to rise to the senate Can Alec help prove his friends innocence

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Tressas estranged sister arrives unwittingly bringing danger with her As a class 5 hurricane rages will Alec be able to save his human friends

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A transmission from Dr Logan in Texas City leads the Alphans to believe that they can finally land back on Earth through a revolutionary teleportation process The downside is that it is now 2120 on Earth and the surface has become an unbreathable wasteland through centuries of pollution The Alphans though are intent on abandoning the wandering moon However due to a hitch the Alphan test subjects find themselves in a primitive and hostile environment It is Scotland in the fourteenth century where the Scots are at war with the English invaders who kidnap the Alphan trio

programme.title: House II The Second Story
programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath is drawn to an alluring old girlfriend who is now married and part of a trick shooting act When her husband is mysteriously killed in a gun accident Heath is accused of murder Jarrod must use a new science to try to clear him but ends up sparring about it with the DAan old law school colleague who is jealous of the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is sent to investigate cattle rustling but upon arrival is told it has been solved However when he hears who was caught he decides to investigate further while renewing a friendship with the lawman who trained him

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Alcoholic Off Joe Landers accidentally gets his partner killed and clumsily tries to cover it up as Stone and Keller work their way to the truth

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF agent Rollin Hand impersonating mobster Frank Wayne has a counter-proposal for the other mob bosses He says hell undergo plastic surgery to look like a different man In comes Cinnamon In reality she is undoing Rollins makeup; she can afford no mistakes because the other mob bosses are watching the entire time Meanwhile a doctor working for the IMF is performing plastic surgery on the real Wayne -- making him to look like Rollin All of this is part of Phelpss plan aimed at getting access to Waynes records But Phelps himself will face an attempted hit before the mission can be concluded

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Police drag in Kimble when a co-worker robs the liquor store the fugitives clerking in Some police suspect Kimbles involved but their chief knows hes not - because his alienated son is the stick-up man To repair their relationship the desperate father needs to get his son off Will he feed Kimble to his wolves to do so

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While travelling cross country Victoria and Heath have an accident resulting in Heath becoming pinned under their heavily loaded wagon Victoria seeks help and turns to a mysterious man who is being pursued by aggressive bounty hunters

programme.title: Psycho II
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Night of the Demons
programme.desc: Night of the Demons is a 1988 American supernatural horror film directed by Kevin S Tenney written and produced by Joe Augustyn and starring Amelia Kinkade Cathy Podewell Linnea Quigley Hal Havins and Alvin Alexis

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Miles Anstead is set to battle in the cage at HK51 against Adrian Miles. See what life is like for him as he gets ready for the fight on October 14...time to choose your side!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Brett Caswell v. Mark Handley

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Stephan Puetz v. Rashid Yusupov

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Jerad Meyer v. Zach Snyder.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Sam Franchi moved from Venezuela to Canada when he was 14 years old. His initial introduction to martial arts came first through Jiu Jitsu. He eventually made a complete transition to MMA. He is the Hard Knocks Flyweight Champion in the amateur division and hopes to keep a clean record while working his way professional division.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Anis Dada v. Scott Turner

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Miles Anstead is set to battle in the cage at HK51 against Adrian Miles. See what life is like for him as he gets ready for the fight on October 14...time to choose your side!

programme.title: The Tim Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with the man who has turn comedy into an art

programme.title: The Chef Felicia Grady Cooking Special
programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Taking the part of a knight starring opposite the famous Lana Lamour a MAD agent in disguise in a MAD movie Inspector Gadget saves the military secrets from falling into MADs hands

programme.title: Challenger of the GoBots
programme.desc: Both sides race to locate the ruins of an ancient GoBotic spacecraft which was carrying a powerful weapon when it crashed into the South American jungle long ago

programme.title: Challenger of the GoBots
programme.desc: An intergalactic sports promoter captures Renegades and Guardians and pits them against each other on Gameworld

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League discovers the Liberty Stone on Paxtar and once again they go in search of it hoping that its power will lead them to Audric Gillian alters their body structure so they can withstand the gravity pressure on Paxtar

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and Flora sense Vantus presence again and Gillian also senses a great deal of power Vantu has captured the magic of the world and put it in a pyramid When he delivers Jayce to Saw Boss the power will be his to use without interference

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is after a scepter from the underground city of Rajim Matt and the team pursue them into the city only to have the tables turned and become prisoners of the citys inhabitants

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Priceless golden relics are mysteriously disappearing in Singapore causing the population to think they are doomed MASK discovers that VENOM has somehow found a way to liquefy gold so they can smuggle it through pipelines

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Rescue! The Jupiter Crew

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: A Lullaby Echoing in War

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dr Wily creates an android that is a replica of Kevins worst enemy from high school

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids accidentally find Zandoras Box which can open doorways to many other places This may be their best chance of getting home but only Zandora herself knows how to use the box and she is trapped somewhere inside it

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The team encounters a band of children from another planet whose spaceship might bring them all home The only problem is that the ship is in Vengers hands

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents have hidden a bomb in the amusement park in Metro City
